description: Example stories showing how to structure user stories for Ralph

userStories.title: Initialize battle grid state management
userStories.description:
Create a BattleGrid class that manages the 8x8 tactical grid for combat encounters.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Grid should be 8x8
- Should track hero and monster positions
- Should allow querying occupancy
- Should support movement validation

userStories.title: Implement action resolution system
userStories.description:
Create ActionResolver that processes combat actions (attack, defend, cast) with proper validation.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Support attack actions with hit/miss
- Support defend actions that reduce damage
- Support spell actions with mana costs
- Return resolution result with outcome

userStories.title: E2E: Complete single combat round
userStories.description:
End-to-end test of a complete combat round from action selection to damage application.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Hero selects attack action
- System rolls attack
- Monster takes damage if hit
- UI updates to show new health
- Turn passes to monster

userStories.title: Add defensive reactions
userStories.description:
Allow heroes and monsters to react with defensive actions when attacked.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Defender can choose to defend reaction
- Defender reaction reduces damage by 50%
- Reaction prevents counter-attack
- Reaction has cooldown of 1 turn

userStories.title: Implement critical hit system
userStories.description:
Add critical hit mechanics where 20% of successful attacks deal 2x damage.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Attack roll of 18+ is critical
- Critical hits deal double damage
- Critical hits trigger special animation
- UI shows critical hit indicator
